label: positive
description: PyPI setup.py with exec(decoded_payload) and base64-encoded exec pattern. Triggers L2-PYPI-POST-001 + L2-PYPI-OBFS-001 (bare exec) + L2-PYPI-OBFS-002 (base64.b64decode) + L2-PYPI-OBFS-007 (base64+exec chain). Strict mode + per-finding gates are the canonical example of the v2.1 schema extension.
